jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at EaseMyTrip
jsonLd.description:
EaseMyTrip invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
